How it works

Three steps.
That's it.

From builder handover to daily operations — Vaastio is operational in 30 minutes. No lengthy onboarding. No technical team required.

01
Set up your society

Add your property — towers, wings, and units. Any structure you can think of. Vaastio maps your reality, not the other way around.

02
Invite your people

Builders, admins, residents, gatekeepers. Everyone gets exactly the access they need. Nothing more. Nothing less.

03
Run your society

Complaints, visitors, announcements, members. Everything in one place. Always running. Always updated.

Built different

Built around how societies actually work.

Any layout, any size

Towers, wings, villas, independent floors, plotted developments. Vaastio maps your reality — not the other way around.

Members that reflect real life

Owners, tenants, co-residents, staff. People move in. People move out. Your records stay accurate automatically.

Roles that make sense

Builder, RWA, Admin, Resident, Gatekeeper — or create your own. Everyone sees exactly what they should. Nothing more.

Visitor Management
Announcements
Gate Entry

See it in action

Three features.
Built for real societies.

Explore how Vaastio handles the moments that matter — from setup to daily management.

01

Build any structure.
In minutes.

Add towers, wings, floors, and units — or villas, plots, independent floors. Whatever your layout, Vaastio maps it exactly. No workarounds. No templates.

Villa communities and plotted developments
Mixed layouts — any combination

02

Raise a complaint.
Know it's heard.

Residents raise complaints with photos and categories. Admins notified instantly. Status updates keep everyone informed. Nothing gets lost in a WhatsApp group.

19 categories — lift, water, parking, noise and more
Photo evidence attached at creation
Public or private visibility control
Both resident and admin can mark resolved

03

Members that reflect
real life.

Full member profiles linked to units. Deactivate, move out, reactivate. Every action tracked. Every change recorded. Always accurate, always up to date.

Owners, tenants, co-residents, staff
Linked to specific units with occupancy type
Full history — who lived where, when
Deactivate access without deleting records
